rounds.title: Foundation Chain
rounds.rawInstruction: Chain 11, turn and crochet to the second chain from hook
rounds.summary: Create the foundation chain and position to begin the first row.

rounds.title: Row 1
rounds.rawInstruction: 9sc, 4sc in the next st, 8sc, 3sc in the last st (24)
rounds.summary: Work single crochets around the foundation chain to form the first row.

rounds.title: Row 2
rounds.summary: Increase in specific positions around.

rounds.title: Row 3
rounds.summary: Work in front loops only, with increases.

rounds.title: Row 4
rounds.summary: Work single crochets with two increases.

rounds.title: Row 5
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.

rounds.title: Change white
rounds.summary: Switch yarn color to white.

rounds.title: Rows 6-9
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for four rows.

rounds.title: Finish, cut and hide the yarn
rounds.rawInstruction: Finish, cut and hide the yarn.
rounds.summary: Finish off and weave in ends.

rounds.title: Foundation Chain
rounds.summary: Create the foundation chain for the bottom case.

rounds.title: Row 1
rounds.rawInstruction: 9sc, 4sc in the next st, 8sc, 3sc in the last st (24)
rounds.summary: Work single crochets around the foundation chain, same as Top Case Row 1.

rounds.title: Row 2
rounds.summary: Increase in specific positions around, same as Top Case Row 2.

rounds.title: Row 3
rounds.summary: Work single crochets with increases, not in FLO (unlike Top Case).

rounds.title: Row 4
rounds.summary: Work single crochets with two increases, same as Top Case Row 4.

rounds.title: Rows 5-7
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for three rows.

rounds.title: Do not cut the yarn, crochet 2sc more
rounds.rawInstruction: Do not cut the yarn, crochet 2sc more
rounds.summary: Keep yarn attached and work two additional single crochets to prepare for joining.

rounds.title: Join shells
rounds.rawInstruction: To join To connect 2 shells, use 10slst. FLO from the top shell, BLO from bottom shell.
rounds.summary: Connect the top and bottom shells using slip stitches through indicated loops.

rounds.title: Ears
rounds.rawInstruction: 7sc in MR, do not join, just tie MR
rounds.summary: Work 7 single crochets into a magic ring, do not join, just tighten the ring.

rounds.title: Row 1
rounds.summary: Work 5 single crochets into a magic ring.

rounds.title: Rows 2-3
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for two rows.

rounds.title: Crochet on both side 2sc
rounds.summary: Crochet on both sides, working 2 single crochets.

rounds.title: Sew all parts
rounds.rawInstruction: Sew all parts, nose, eyes and cheeks to finish.
rounds.summary: Attach all parts and embroider facial features.

materials: Needle and thread for sewing eyes, nose
